directive.title: FS-RESP-SHARED-001: Harden Shared KpiGrid.tsx and DataTable.tsx with Canonical Mobile-Responsive Defaults

auditor.summary: The build partially satisfies the directive's acceptance criteria. KpiGrid correctly implements the safelisted colMap pattern and avoids dynamic class interpolation. DataTable has the overflow-x-auto wrapper and text-sm on all cells. However, critical issues exist: (1) Playwright test (b) does not actually test mobileColumns=1 as required, (2) interactive elements in DataTable lack comprehensive 44px touch target coverage, (3) TypeScript strict mode is violated by `any` type usage, (4) Playwright tests depend on pages that may not use the modified components. The build needs significant fixes before it can pass audit.

top_issues.description: Test (b) does not actually test mobileColumns=1. It navigates to /dashboard/overview and checks the default grid class with a regex. No mechanism exists to pass mobileColumns=1 to KpiGrid in this test.

Non-sortable header cells and all <td> cells lack min-h-[44px] and min-w-[44px] classes. The spec requires ALL interactive elements to have 44px touch targets. Non-sortable headers rendered as <span> are not interactive, but <td> cells containing action buttons/links need the classes.
DataTableWithColumns component uses `any` type for data records: `data: Record<string, any>[]`. This violates TypeScript strict mode requirement.
